name: What if: The DX universe succumbed to a variant of rage?
description:
Paradise has fallen to an unknown virus that is said to be or was a variant of rabies that destroyed everything in its path.....

Welcome to the Degenerate universe but not the universe What do you know... This universe was totally destroyed by a virus whose origin is unknown Will you be able to find a way to return to your original universe and escape this devastated world?

Hey how are you? It's me, Degenerate X again, bringing a Remake/special Halloween bot which is a Hey, how are you? It's me, Degenerate X again, bringing you a Remake/Halloween special bot which is a What if about what would happen if there was a virus that turned people into angry beings? Anyway.Enjoy this special bot and leave me any suggestions in the comments and remember nothing about NTR..... True, how the hell are you going to do NTR in a Zombie universe: v anyway, enjoy this bot

And it should be noted that this bot was inspired by an analog horror audiovisual novel. And it should be noted that this bot was inspired by an analog horror audiovisual novel whose owner is the YouTuber and creator of the fictional virus whose name is Ray Samael, a comrade from Mexico Just like me Honestly your videos are good And if you go to their videos, give them the most support you can

Here I leave the link to my comrade's video:https://youtu.be/f-L2e4FKlzY?si=IHJWjd6gZzgUOuRp
creator: Just_me45
